name: TM1638 7 Segment Display Keypad & LED Module
description: The `tm1638` display platform allows you to use the popular TM1638 7 Segment Display Keypad & LED Module with ESPHome.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to re-draw the screen. Defaults to `1s`.

config_entries.label: Clk Pin
config_entries.description: The pin you have the CLK line hooked up to.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: DIO Pin
config_entries.description: The pin you have the DIO line hooked up to.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Stb Pin
config_entries.description: The pin you have the STB line hooked up to.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Intensity
config_entries.description: The intensity with which the TM1638 should drive the outputs. Range is from 0 (least intense) to 7 (the default). This setting will affect the 7 segment display and the 8 individual LED lights.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: The lambda to use for rendering the content on the TM1638. See [Rendering Lambda](https://esphome.io/components/display/tm1638#display-tm1638_lambda) for more information.
